Notes: Final game for Rutgers-Camden. Senior Day for Lady Raptors' Karen Carter
Kean advances to the NJAC Championships and will host a second-round game at
7 p.m. on Thursday, Feb. 22, against an opponent to be determined. Beyruti
sets Kean career mark with 153rd three-pointer. Cooper double-double
Game.Officials: James Perry Jr.,  Steve Geffen,  Stephen Shincarick
